name: Smoldering Seduction
descrip: Get an opponent hot and bothered with words and your dashing good looks. Can charm opponents. Is a Foreplay skill.
outcome: [AttackerName] whispers sexual, flirtatious words to [TargetName] while subtly showing off [AttackerHisOrHer] striking muscles, and [TargetHeOrShe] flushes at the implications.
miss: [AttackerName] whispers sexual, flirtatious words to [TargetName] while subtly showing off [AttackerHisOrHer] striking muscles, but they appear to be unaffected.
statusOutcome: [TargetName]'s mind is filled with sexual fantasies from [AttackerName]'s words. [TargetName] has been charmed!
